Sidewalk Monorepo

Build civic reporting across API, web, mobile, and Stellar services.

This workspace now includes a standalone Next.js application so frontend, backend, and mobile contributors can work in parallel without inventing local setup.

Open health pageView repository

API

Express backend with auth, reports, media, and worker-backed anchoring.

Web

New Next.js surface for diagnostics and future citizen and admin flows.

Mobile

Expo app for field reporting and citizen status tracking.
